# LuxDL Docs

> Elegant & Performant Deep Learning in JuliaLang

Model with the elegance of Julia, and the performance of XLA.

## Table of Contents

### Getting Started

- [Introduction {#getting-started}](/v1/introduction.md)
- [Why we wrote Lux? {#Why-we-wrote-Lux?}](/v1/introduction/overview.md)
- [Resources to Get Started {#Resources-to-Get-Started}](/v1/introduction/resources.md)
- [Updating to Lux v1 {#updating-to-v1}](/v1/introduction/updating_to_v1.md)
- [Citation {#Citation}](/v1/introduction/citation.md)

### Tutorials

- [Tutorials](/v1/tutorials.md)

- [Graph Convolutional Networks on Cora {#GCN-Tutorial-Cora}](/v1/tutorials/intermediate/6_GCN_Cora.md)
- [Normalizing Flows for Density Estimation {#Normalizing-Flows-for-Density-Estimation}](/v1/tutorials/intermediate/7_RealNVP.md)
- [Building a LSTM Encoder-Decoder model using Lux.jl {#Building-a-LSTM-Encoder-Decoder-model-using-Lux.jl}](/v1/tutorials/intermediate/8_LSTMEncoderDecoder.md)
- [ConvMixer on CIFAR-10 {#ConvMixer-on-CIFAR-10}](/v1/tutorials/intermediate/9_CIFAR10_conv_mixer.md)
- [Convolutional Neural Network on CIFAR-10 {#Convolutional-Neural-Network-on-CIFAR-10}](/v1/tutorials/intermediate/10_CIFAR10_simple_cnn.md)
- [ResNet20 on CIFAR-10 {#ResNet20-on-CIFAR-10}](/v1/tutorials/intermediate/11_CIFAR10_resnet20.md)
